subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast sacrificed thy soul and spirit for the love of the Beauty of God, who hast forsaken thy native land, traversed the wilderness and attained to the presence of thy Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من بذل النفس و الروح حبا لجمال الله و هاجر الدیار و قطع القفار و فاز بالوفود
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @education of children; moral education, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @praise and encouragement, @firmness in the Covenant, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
